title: The Ultimate Penn State Bed Party Guide
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to creating a stunning Penn State bed party — the viral trend where high school seniors celebrate their college commitment by decorating their beds with school colors, merchandise, and decorations.
bodyHtml:
Getting your Penn State acceptance letter is one of the most exciting moments of a high school senior's life. And there's no better way to celebrate your college commitment than throwing a Penn State bed party — the viral trend sweeping TikTok and Instagram where students transform their beds into a full-blown school spirit showcase before they even step foot on campus.

Whether you're a lifelong Nittany Lions fan or you just fell in love with Penn State the moment you visited State College, a Penn State bed party is the ultimate way to announce your commitment, snap some incredible photos for your feed, and get hyped for what's ahead. This guide covers everything you need to plan the perfect Penn State bed party — from must-have PSU essentials to decoration ideas and styling tips.

What Is a College Bed Party?

A college bed party (sometimes called a "college commitment party" or "signing day celebration") is a trend where high school seniors decorate their bedroom — particularly their bed — in their college's colors and merchandise to celebrate getting in. It's the new signing day for college-bound seniors. You pile on your school's hoodie, blanket, and pillows, surround yourself with balloons and streamers in your school colors, and take photos to share with friends, family, and on social media. The results are always stunning — and Penn State's blue and white color scheme makes for some of the most photogenic bed party setups around.

Must-Have Penn State Bed Party Essentials

The key to a great Penn State bed party is layering the right products to create a rich, cohesive look. Here are the essentials every PSU bed party needs:

  • Penn State Hoodie or Crewneck — Every bed party starts with the outfit. Wear your PSU hoodie or an oversized vintage-washed crewneck in navy blue. Pair it with Penn State pajama pants for the full look.
  • Penn State Blanket — A cozy navy blue fleece blanket with the Nittany Lions logo is the centerpiece of your bed setup. Drape it across your bed as the main focal point.
  • Penn State Pillows Set — Layer a set of PSU throw pillows (navy with logo + white with Penn State text) at the head of your bed for that professional, photo-ready look.
  • PSU Balloon Letters — Jumbo silver or blue letter balloons spelling out "PSU" or "PENN STATE" are a must. These make for incredible photos and instantly set the scene.
  • Blue & White Streamers — Line the back of your headboard or hang them across the wall behind your bed. Blue, white, and silver metallic streamers give the setup that extra pop.
  • Penn State LED Light — A blue LED light or a Penn State neon sign adds atmosphere and makes your photos look incredible, especially in low light.
  • Nittany Lion Plush — No Penn State bed party is complete without a Nittany Lion stuffed animal front and center on your bed.
  • Penn State Flag — Hang a Penn State flag or banner on the wall above your bed as a backdrop for your photos.

Penn State Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The magic of a Penn State bed party is in how you layer the decorations. Penn State's blue and white color palette is clean and striking — here's how to make the most of it:

The Wall Backdrop

Start by creating a dramatic backdrop on the wall behind your bed. Hang alternating blue and white streamers vertically from the top of the wall down. Layer in a Penn State flag or a "We Are Penn State" banner in the center. If you have LED strip lights, line the top edge of the backdrop for a glowing effect. This creates the perfect photo backdrop.

The Balloon Arch

Use navy blue, white, and silver balloons to create a balloon arch over the head of your bed or around your door frame. Place your jumbo "PSU" letter balloons front and center. Balloon arches are the #1 most-shared Penn State bed party element on TikTok — they photograph beautifully and create an instant wow factor.

The Bed Setup

Layer your Penn State blanket over your existing bedding. Arrange your PSU pillows at the head. Place the Nittany Lion plush in the center. Add any Penn State hats, water bottles, or smaller merchandise items around the bed for extra detail shots.

Penn State Bed Party Styling Tips

  • Stick to the blue, white, and silver color palette — avoid introducing too many other colors so the setup looks cohesive.
  • Use natural daylight for your photos — morning light makes those blue and white colors pop.
  • Wear your Penn State outfit and sit on the bed for the main photo, then take flat-lay detail shots of the merchandise.
  • Film a "setting up my Penn State bed party" TikTok — these videos get massive engagement, especially if you tag @pennstate.
  • Add a "We Are Penn State" or "Class of 2029" sign for personalization.

College Commitment Gifts for Penn State Students

Penn State bed parties also make amazing college acceptance gifts. If you're shopping for a Penn State-bound senior in your life, putting together a Penn State bed party kit — hoodie, blanket, balloon letters, and some blue and white streamers — is the ultimate thoughtful gift. It gives them everything they need to celebrate in style and creates a memory they'll cherish forever. These items also double as real dorm room essentials they'll use throughout their college career.

We Are Penn State — and now it's time to show it off. Ready to shop for your Penn State bed party? We've curated all the best PSU bed party essentials in one place, with links directly to Amazon so you can have everything delivered fast.

title: The Ultimate Alabama Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Roll Tide! Getting into the University of Alabama is something to celebrate in a major way — and nothing says "I'm a Bama girl" quite like a full Alabama bed party.
bodyHtml:
What Is a College Bed Party?

A college bed party (also called a "college commitment celebration" or "signing day party") is a trend where high school seniors pile their college's merchandise onto their bed, decorate their room in school colors, and take photos to share the news. It's become the go-to way for seniors to announce their college commitment on social media. For Alabama fans, the results are always stunning — crimson red, pure white, and elephant-themed everything makes for an unforgettable setup.

Must-Have Alabama Bed Party Essentials

Here's your complete Alabama bed party shopping list — every item that makes a Crimson Tide setup stand out:

  • Alabama Crewneck or Hoodie — The centerpiece of your outfit. Go with a classic crimson crewneck or an oversized Alabama hoodie. Pair with Alabama sweatpants for the full bed party look.
  • Alabama Blanket — A plush crimson fleece blanket with the Alabama "A" logo goes across your bed as the main base layer.
  • Alabama Pillows — Layer crimson and white throw pillows at the head of your bed. Script "Alabama" text pillows are especially popular.
  • BAMA Balloon Letters — Jumbo crimson or red letter balloons spelling "BAMA" or "ALABAMA" are the most-photographed element of any Alabama bed party.
  • Crimson & White Streamers — Hang red and white streamers as a wall backdrop behind your bed for that dramatic effect.
  • Alabama Neon Sign — A "Roll Tide" or Alabama "A" neon light creates the most incredible photos, especially when combined with streamers.
  • Alabama Elephant Plush — Big Al belongs on every Alabama bed party. Place the elephant plush front and center on your bed.
  • Alabama Blinged Stanley Cup — Pink or crimson rhinestone-covered Stanley tumblers have become THE Alabama bed party accessory. It's a must.
  • Alabama Flag — Hang an Alabama Crimson Tide flag or banner above your bed as a backdrop.

Alabama Bed Party Decoration Ideas

Go Bold with Red

Alabama's crimson color is bold and beautiful — don't be shy about it. Cover as much surface as possible with crimson decorations. Crimson balloons, crimson streamers, crimson candles, crimson ribbon — the more red, the better the photos. Layer white accents on top to create contrast and make the red pop even more.

The Wall Backdrop

Create a floor-to-ceiling crimson and white streamer backdrop on the wall behind your bed. Alternate red and white streamers for a striped effect. Center an Alabama flag or an "A" banner in the middle. Add your balloon letters in front of the backdrop and you've got a TikTok-worthy setup.

The Bed Layering Strategy

Start with your Alabama blanket as the base. Layer crimson and white pillows at the head. Place Big Al (your elephant plush) prominently. Arrange smaller items — your blinged Stanley, hat, water bottle — around the perimeter. Hold a "Roll Tide" sign or the letter balloons for your hero photo.

Alabama Bed Party Ideas for Every Budget

  • Budget pick: Crimson and white streamers ($5) + jumbo balloon letters ($7 each) = instant Alabama bed party backdrop for under $30.
  • Mid-range: Add an Alabama blanket, hoodie, and elephant plush for a full merchandise setup around $100.
  • Go all out: Include the blinged Stanley, neon sign, Alabama cake supplies, and matching plates and napkins for the full celebration experience.

Alabama College Commitment Gifts

Shopping for an Alabama-bound senior? An Alabama bed party gift kit is the most thoughtful college acceptance gift you can give. Put together a crimson gift bag with a hoodie, blanket, balloon letters, and streamers — everything they need to throw their own celebration. Add in the blinged Stanley or an elephant plush for extra points. These items will be used throughout their entire college career, making this a gift that truly lasts.

Ready to Roll Tide in style? Shop our complete Alabama bed party essentials collection — every product is hand-picked, available on Amazon with fast shipping, and perfect for making your BAMA announcement the one everyone's talking about.

title: The Ultimate Michigan Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Go Blue! Getting into the University of Michigan is a massive achievement worth celebrating with a Michigan bed party to announce your college commitment and show Wolverines pride.
bodyHtml:
Go Blue! Getting into the University of Michigan — one of the most competitive and prestigious universities in the country — is a massive achievement worth celebrating in a big way. A Michigan bed party is the perfect way to announce your college commitment, show your Wolverines pride, and create photos and memories you'll cherish long after you graduate.

Michigan's iconic maize and blue color scheme is one of college football's most recognizable palettes — and it translates beautifully into bed party setups. The rich navy blue and bright yellow-gold create a bold, high-contrast look that photographs stunningly. This guide covers everything you need to plan the perfect Michigan bed party, from must-have Wolverines merchandise to decoration ideas that'll dominate your Instagram feed.

What Is a Michigan Bed Party?

A Michigan bed party is a college commitment celebration where you transform your bedroom in maize and blue Michigan merchandise, decorations, and school spirit gear before you even move into the dorms. It's the viral trend that's become the go-to way for college-bound seniors to announce their commitment on TikTok and Instagram. Michigan bed parties are especially popular because the maize and blue color combination photographs so vividly — your photos will look like a professional shoot.

Must-Have Michigan Bed Party Essentials

  • Michigan Hoodie — A classic Michigan Wolverines hoodie in navy blue is the anchor of your bed party outfit. Look for the classic block "M" or "Michigan" script styles.
  • Michigan Quarter-Zip or Bow Crewneck — For a more stylish look, a Michigan quarter-zip or the popular bow crewneck are trending picks for bed parties.
  • Michigan Blanket — A navy blue or maize fleece blanket with the Wolverines logo is your bed's main base layer.
  • Michigan Pillows — Layer maize and blue throw pillows at the head of your bed. Block "M" pillows are especially iconic.
  • Michigan Balloon Letters — Jumbo blue or maize letter balloons spelling "MICHIGAN" or "U of M" are the most viral element of any Michigan bed party.
  • Maize & Blue Streamers — Hang alternating yellow and navy streamers as a wall backdrop. The color contrast is incredible on camera.
  • Michigan Stanley Cup — A maize or navy Michigan-branded Stanley tumbler has become a staple Michigan bed party accessory.
  • Michigan LED Lights — String lights or LED block letter lights in maize or blue add ambiance to your setup.
  • Michigan Flag — Hang a large Michigan Wolverines flag behind your bed as a photo backdrop.
  • Michigan Party Supplies — Maize and blue plates, cups, and napkins are perfect if you're hosting a full celebration with friends and family.

Michigan Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The Maize & Blue Streamer Wall

The key to a show-stopping Michigan bed party backdrop is alternating maize (yellow) and navy blue streamers hung vertically from ceiling to floor behind your bed. The high contrast between these two colors is what makes Michigan bed parties so visually striking. Center a Michigan flag or "Go Blue" banner in the middle of the streamer wall.

The Balloon Statement

Michigan bed parties on TikTok often feature large balloon letter displays. Spell out "MICHIGAN," "GO BLUE," or your graduation year in jumbo blue or gold letter balloons. Create a balloon cluster with a mix of navy, maize, and white balloons on either side of your letter balloons for extra dimension.

The Merchandise Stack

Layer your Michigan blanket across the bed, arrange pillows at the head, and display your Michigan sweatpants, hat, and Stanley cup strategically around the setup. The more Michigan merchandise you can pile on, the better — this is your chance to show off your full Wolverines collection.

Michigan Bed Party Styling Tips

  • The maize and blue contrast is your superpower — lean into it fully by using both colors in every layer of your setup.
  • Michigan Wolverines patterns (the winged helmet motif, block M) add authentic school spirit that generic blue and yellow doesn't.
  • Film a "come with me to my Michigan bed party setup" TikTok — these behind-the-scenes setup videos are hugely popular.
  • Photograph during golden hour for that perfect maize-colored light that complements the yellow in your setup.
  • Add a handwritten "Go Blue, Class of 2029!" sign for a personal touch.

Michigan College Commitment Gifts

A Michigan bed party kit makes a perfect college acceptance gift for any Michigan-bound senior. Assemble a gift set with a Michigan hoodie, blanket, and a set of maize and blue balloon letters — everything they need to throw their celebration. For an extra special touch, add a Michigan Stanley cup and a Michigan hat. These practical, school-spirit items will be used for years throughout their Michigan experience.

Ready to plan your Michigan bed party? Shop our complete Michigan Wolverines bed party essentials — all available on Amazon with fast delivery so you can celebrate your commitment as soon as the acceptance letter arrives.

title: The Ultimate Boston University Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Getting into Boston University is a major achievement — and it deserves a celebration to match.
bodyHtml:
Getting into Boston University is a major achievement — and it deserves a celebration to match. A BU bed party is the perfect way to announce your college commitment, show off your Terriers pride, and create viral-worthy photos that your entire senior class will be talking about.

Boston University's scarlet red and white color scheme creates some of the most vibrant and energetic bed party setups you'll see on TikTok and Instagram. The bold red against crisp white is visually stunning and photographs beautifully. Whether you're planning your own BU bed party or shopping for a college-bound senior in your life, this complete guide has everything you need.

What Is a College Bed Party?

A college bed party is a celebration trend where high school seniors decorate their bedroom in their college's colors and merchandise to celebrate their college acceptance or commitment. You wear your school's hoodie, surround yourself with school-colored balloons and streamers, and take photos and videos to share on social media. For BU students, the scarlet and white color palette creates a particularly striking and photogenic look.

Must-Have Boston University Bed Party Essentials

  • BU Hoodie — A Boston University Terriers hoodie in scarlet red is the signature piece of any BU bed party outfit. Oversized styles look especially great for photos.
  • BU Crewneck — The BU long-sleeve crewneck is a popular alternative for a more layered look.
  • BU Blanket — A plush BU-branded blanket in scarlet and white is the perfect centerpiece for your bed.
  • BU Pillows — Layer BU Terriers throw pillows at the head of your bed for a polished, put-together look.
  • BOSTON Balloon Letters — Jumbo red or gold letter balloons spelling "BOSTON" or "BU" are the most iconic Boston University bed party element.
  • Red & White Streamers — Hang red and white streamers as a wall backdrop. Red heart balloons mixed in give a distinctly BU aesthetic.
  • BU Terrier Plush — Rhett, the Boston Terrier mascot, belongs at the center of every BU bed party.
  • BU Water Bottle or Stanley — A BU-branded water bottle or tumbler is a practical accessory that photographs well.
  • BU Sticker Sheets — Layer BU stickers on your laptop lid or notebook as part of the flat-lay detail shots.
  • LED "B" Letter Light — A gold or red illuminated letter B adds a glowing accent to your BU setup.

Boston University Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The Scarlet & White Streamer Wall

Create a dramatic backdrop by hanging alternating red and white streamers vertically behind your bed. For extra BU flair, mix in red heart balloons (a popular BU bed party signature) and a silver or gold tassel banner across the top. This backdrop transforms any bedroom into a BU celebration space.

The Balloon Display

BU bed parties are known for their creative balloon arrangements. Spell out "BOSTON" in jumbo red letter balloons, and cluster red, white, and gold balloons around the letters. Red heart-shaped balloons add a romantic Boston aesthetic that's become a signature look for BU bed parties on TikTok.

The Bed Layout

Lay your BU blanket across your bed as the foundation. Arrange BU pillows at the head. Place Rhett (the BU terrier plush) front and center. Set your BU water bottle and hat on the side. Wear your BU hoodie and sit on the bed for the main hero shot.

BU Bed Party Styling Tips

  • Mix scarlet, white, and gold accents — BU's official colors include a touch of gold that elevates the look.
  • Red heart balloons are a BU bed party signature — include at least a few for an authentic BU aesthetic.
  • The BU campus has incredible architecture — if possible, take some photos near a BU landmark on the day of your celebration.
  • Tag @bu_today and use #BU2029 (or your class year) on your celebration photos for maximum reach.
  • Film your setup process for TikTok — BU bed party setup videos consistently go viral in the spring.

Boston University College Commitment Gifts

A Boston University bed party kit is one of the most thoughtful and exciting college acceptance gifts you can give a BU-bound senior. Put together a scarlet gift set including a BU hoodie, blanket, balloon letters, and red and white streamers. Add in Rhett the terrier plush for an adorable touch. Every item serves a dual purpose — it makes the bed party look amazing, and then gets used all throughout their years at BU.

Ready to celebrate your BU acceptance in style? Shop our complete Boston University bed party essentials — all hand-curated and available on Amazon with fast shipping so you can celebrate the moment your acceptance letter arrives.

title: The Ultimate Ohio State Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Getting into The Ohio State University is a milestone worth celebrating in the biggest way possible — and a Buckeyes bed party is exactly the kind of over-the-top celebration that OSU pride demands.
bodyHtml:
O-H-I-O! Getting into The Ohio State University is a milestone worth celebrating in the biggest way possible — and a Buckeyes bed party is exactly the kind of over-the-top celebration that OSU pride demands. From the scarlet and gray color palette to the iconic "O" logo, Ohio State has some of the most instantly recognizable school spirit merchandise in college sports, which means Ohio State bed parties are always visually spectacular.

This complete Ohio State bed party guide will walk you through every product, decoration idea, and styling tip you need to create a Buckeyes setup that'll go viral on TikTok and Instagram. Whether you're planning your own OSU bed party or gifting one to a college-bound Buckeye fan, this guide has everything you need.

What Is an Ohio State Bed Party?

An Ohio State bed party is a college commitment celebration where you decorate your bedroom — especially your bed — in scarlet and gray Ohio State merchandise and decorations to celebrate your acceptance to OSU. It's the viral trend that's replaced the signing day ceremony for college-bound seniors, and Ohio State bed parties in particular are some of the most elaborate and visually impressive on social media, thanks to OSU's bold scarlet red color scheme.

Must-Have Ohio State Bed Party Essentials

  • OSU Hoodie — A classic Ohio State Buckeyes hoodie in scarlet is the essential piece of your bed party outfit.
  • Ohio State Blanket — A scarlet or gray OSU fleece blanket with the Buckeyes logo is the foundation of your bed setup.
  • Ohio State Pillows — Layer scarlet and gray OSU throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • OSU Balloon Letters — Jumbo red letter balloons spelling "OSU" or "OHIO STATE" are the most photographed element of any Buckeyes bed party.
  • Scarlet & Gray Streamers — Hang red and gray (or silver) streamers as a dramatic wall backdrop behind your bed.
  • LED OSU Letters — Illuminated block letter O-S-U lights are a hugely popular Ohio State bed party element that make photos look amazing.
  • Ohio State Neon Sign — A "Buckeyes" or "O-H-I-O" neon sign adds a glow to your setup that photographs beautifully.
  • Brutus Bobblehead or Plush — Brutus Buckeye belongs at the center of every OSU bed party.
  • Ohio State Hat — A scarlet Buckeyes snapback or fitted cap adds a streetwear element to your layout.
  • Ohio State Flag — Hang an OSU flag or banner behind your bed as a large-scale photo backdrop.

Ohio State Bed Party Decoration Ideas

Go Full Scarlet

Ohio State's scarlet red is one of the most vibrant and bold colors in college sports. Lean into it completely. Cover the wall behind your bed with scarlet and gray streamers. Add scarlet balloons in varying sizes — round, heart-shaped, and letter balloons together. The more red you layer, the more dramatic and impressive the final result.

LED Letters for the Win

One of the most popular Ohio State bed party moves on TikTok is using LED block letter lights to spell out "OSU" and placing them at the head of the bed or on a dresser behind the setup. Combined with the scarlet streamer backdrop and balloon letters, the LED lights create a layered, multi-dimensional look that photographs stunningly.

The Bed Setup

Start with your Ohio State blanket as the base layer. Add scarlet and gray pillows at the head. Place Brutus center stage. Arrange your OSU hat, water bottle, and any other smaller merchandise items strategically around the bed. Wear your OSU hoodie for the main photo, or hold your diploma/acceptance letter for a "just got in!" moment.

Ohio State College Commitment Gift Ideas

An Ohio State bed party gift set is one of the best college acceptance gifts you can give a Buckeye fan. Combine an OSU hoodie, blanket, pillows, and a set of scarlet letter balloons into a gift box. Add LED OSU letters for a premium touch. Every single item in the set serves a real purpose both for the bed party photos and for everyday dorm life — making this one of the most practical and memorable college gifts around.

Ready to celebrate your Ohio State acceptance? Browse our complete Ohio State Buckeyes bed party essentials — all available on Amazon and ready to ship fast so you can start your celebration the moment you get the news.

title: The Ultimate UNC Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Getting into UNC Chapel Hill — one of the top public universities in the country — is an achievement that deserves a legendary celebration.
bodyHtml:
Getting into UNC Chapel Hill — one of the top public universities in the country — is an achievement that deserves a legendary celebration. A UNC Tar Heels bed party lets you show off your Carolina pride, announce your commitment to friends and family, and create stunning photos in the most beautiful shade in college sports: Carolina blue.

Carolina blue is soft, dreamy, and photographs absolutely beautifully — which is why UNC bed parties have some of the most aesthetic and Pinterest-worthy setups you'll find. The light blue against white creates an ethereal, elegant look that stands out from the bolder, darker school color palettes. This guide covers every UNC bed party essential you need for the perfect Tar Heels celebration.

What Is a UNC Bed Party?

A UNC bed party is a college acceptance celebration where you deck out your bedroom in Carolina blue and white UNC merchandise, decorations, and school spirit gear. It's the viral social media trend that's become the standard way for college-bound seniors to announce their commitment. UNC bed parties are particularly popular for their light, airy aesthetic — the Carolina blue color scheme creates a look that's more Pinterest mood board than typical school spirit party.

Must-Have UNC Bed Party Essentials

  • UNC Hoodie — A Carolina blue Tar Heels hoodie is the foundation of your bed party look. Oversized fits photograph beautifully.
  • UNC Crewneck — For a softer, more aesthetic look, a Carolina blue UNC crewneck or long-sleeve shirt works perfectly.
  • UNC Blanket — A soft Carolina blue fleece blanket with the UNC logo goes across your bed as the main base layer.
  • UNC Pillows — Layer Carolina blue and white throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • UNC Balloon Letters — Jumbo light blue letter balloons spelling "UNC" or "CAROLINA" create the perfect focal point.
  • Carolina Blue & White Streamers — Hang light blue and white streamers as a dreamy backdrop. The soft color combination photographs like a dream.
  • UNC Terrier or Ram Plush — The UNC Tar Heels mascot plush belongs center-stage in your setup.
  • UNC Water Bottle or Stanley — A Carolina blue UNC-branded tumbler is a practical and photogenic bed party accessory.
  • UNC Stickers — Layer UNC stickers on your laptop or notebook for detail shots.
  • Carolina Blue Candles or Fairy Lights — Light blue candles or white fairy lights add soft ambiance that complements the Carolina blue palette perfectly.

UNC Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The Dreamy Carolina Blue Backdrop

Hang light blue and white streamers vertically behind your bed for a soft, dreamy backdrop. Mix in white balloon clusters and light blue heart balloons for extra dimension. A "Tar Heels" or "UNC Chapel Hill" banner in the center ties the whole look together. The softness of Carolina blue means you don't need to go over-the-top — even a simple streamer backdrop looks stunning.

The Aesthetic Bed Layering

Start with your Carolina blue UNC blanket across the bed. Add Carolina blue and white pillows at the head. Place your UNC mascot plush in the center. Arrange a few accent items — a UNC candle, your Stanley cup, a UNC pennant — around the edges. The goal for a UNC bed party is an aesthetic, editorial look rather than a maximalist party setup.

UNC Bed Party Styling Tips

  • Lean into the soft, aesthetic quality of Carolina blue — UNC bed parties look great with a more curated, editorial feel.
  • White accents make the Carolina blue pop — use white streamers, white balloons, and white candles to create contrast.
  • Natural light is your best friend — shoot near a window during morning light for the softest, most flattering photos.
  • Add a "Carolina Born and Bred" or "Class of 2029" custom sign for a personal touch.
  • Use #UNC2029 and #TarHeels on your photos for maximum reach.

UNC College Commitment Gifts

A UNC bed party gift set is one of the most thoughtful college acceptance gifts for a Tar Heels fan. Put together a Carolina blue gift basket with a UNC hoodie, blanket, balloon letters, and light blue and white streamers. Add a Tar Heels water bottle or Stanley for extra points. Everything doubles as practical dorm essentials, making this the gift that keeps giving throughout all four years at Chapel Hill.

Ready to celebrate your Carolina commitment? Shop our complete UNC Tar Heels bed party essentials — all available on Amazon with fast delivery so you can start your celebration the moment your acceptance arrives.

title: The Ultimate Vanderbilt Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Getting into Vanderbilt University — one of the most selective universities in the Southeast — is an extraordinary achievement.
bodyHtml:
Getting into Vanderbilt University — one of the most selective universities in the Southeast — is an extraordinary achievement. And an extraordinary achievement deserves an extraordinary celebration. A Vanderbilt bed party lets you announce your Commodores commitment in style, with a black and gold setup that's as elegant and sophisticated as Vanderbilt itself.

Vanderbilt's black and gold color scheme creates some of the most sophisticated and visually striking bed party setups in college sports. The dark black against rich gold makes for dramatic, high-contrast photos that look expensive and intentional. This guide covers every Vanderbilt bed party essential you need for a Commodores celebration.

Must-Have Vanderbilt Bed Party Essentials

  • Vanderbilt Hoodie or Crewneck — A Commodores hoodie or crewneck in black or gold anchors your bed party outfit.
  • Vanderbilt Blanket — A plush Commodores blanket in black and gold is the main centerpiece of your bed.
  • Vanderbilt Pillows — Layer black and gold Commodores throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • VANDY Balloon Letters — Jumbo gold or black letter balloons spelling "VANDY" or "VANDERBILT" create a striking focal point.
  • Black & Gold Streamers — Alternating black and gold streamers create an incredibly dramatic and sophisticated backdrop.
  • Vanderbilt Pennant or Flag — Hang a Commodores pennant or flag behind your bed for an authentic school spirit backdrop.
  • Star Logo Accessories — Vanderbilt's iconic star logo is one of college sports' most distinctive marks — look for items featuring it prominently.
  • Gold Balloons — A cluster of gold foil and latex balloons adds luxury and warmth to the black-heavy color palette.

Vanderbilt Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The Sophisticated Black & Gold Backdrop

Hang alternating black and gold streamers behind your bed. The contrast between these two colors creates one of the most dramatic-looking bed party backdrops in college sports. Center a Vanderbilt flag or a gold "Commodores" banner in the middle. Add gold foil balloon clusters on either side for a luxurious, high-end look.

The Elegant Bed Setup

Vanderbilt bed parties work best with a more curated, elegant aesthetic rather than a maximalist approach. Lay your Vanderbilt blanket neatly across your bed. Arrange black and gold pillows symmetrically at the head. Place a few carefully chosen accent items — a Commodores pennant, a gold candle, a Vandy hat — around the perimeter for a polished, editorial look.

Vanderbilt Bed Party Styling Tips

  • Less is more with Vandy — a curated, intentional setup looks more aligned with Vanderbilt's sophisticated brand than an overwhelmingly maximalist one.
  • Gold accents are everything — use gold foil balloons, gold ribbon, and gold candles to warm up the heavy black.
  • Vanderbilt's star logo is iconic — prioritize merchandise that features it prominently.
  • Shoot in warm, soft light to complement the gold tones in your setup.
  • Use #Vanderbilt2029 and #AnchorDown on your celebration photos.

Vanderbilt College Commitment Gifts

A Vanderbilt bed party kit is a uniquely thoughtful college acceptance gift for a Commodores-bound senior. The black and gold color scheme makes for an inherently sophisticated gift presentation. Include a Vandy hoodie, blanket, gold balloon letters, and black and gold streamers. These items will be used throughout their time at one of the best universities in the country.

Ready to celebrate your Vanderbilt acceptance? Shop our complete Vanderbilt Commodores bed party essentials — all available on Amazon and ready to ship fast.

title: The Ultimate LSU Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Geaux Tigers! Getting into Louisiana State University is worth celebrating in a big, bold, Louisiana way — and nothing does it better than an LSU bed party dripping in purple and gold.
bodyHtml:
Geaux Tigers! Getting into Louisiana State University is worth celebrating in a big, bold, Louisiana way — and nothing does it better than an LSU bed party dripping in purple and gold. LSU's color scheme is one of college football's most iconic and visually dramatic, making for bed party setups that stop the scroll every single time.

Purple and gold is a regal, jewel-toned combination that photographs beautifully and creates a luxurious, high-energy look. Whether you're planning your own LSU celebration or shopping for a Tigers fan in your life, this complete LSU bed party guide has everything you need.

Must-Have LSU Bed Party Essentials

  • LSU Hoodie or Crewneck — A purple or gold LSU Tigers hoodie is the centerpiece of your bed party outfit.
  • LSU Blanket — A plush LSU blanket in purple and gold is your bed's main base layer.
  • LSU Pillows — Layer purple and gold Tigers throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • LSU Balloon Letters — Jumbo purple or gold letter balloons spelling "LSU" or "GEAUX TIGERS" are the most photographed element.
  • Purple & Gold Streamers — Alternating purple and gold streamers create one of the most dramatic bed party backdrops in college sports.
  • LSU Tiger Eye Patch or Plush — Mike the Tiger belongs front and center in your LSU setup.
  • Gold Foil Balloons — Large gold foil star or number balloons add a luxurious touch to the purple and gold palette.
  • LSU Hat — A purple or gold Tigers snapback adds the finishing athletic touch to your bed party layout.
  • LSU Flag — Hang a large LSU flag behind your bed as a dramatic backdrop.
  • LSU Party Supplies — Purple and gold plates, cups, and napkins are perfect for hosting a full Geaux Tigers celebration with family.

LSU Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The Royal Purple & Gold Backdrop

Hang alternating purple and gold streamers from ceiling to floor behind your bed. The jewel-toned purple and warm gold create an incredibly rich and luxurious backdrop. Layer in gold foil balloon clusters and large purple latex balloons for dimension. Center your "LSU" letter balloons in front of the streamer wall.

The Bed Setup

Lay your LSU blanket across your bed as the foundation. Add purple and gold pillows at the head. Place Mike the Tiger plush front and center. Arrange your LSU hat, water bottle, and any other smaller merchandise items around the bed. Wear your LSU hoodie and hold a "Geaux Tigers!" sign for the hero photo.

LSU Bed Party Styling Tips

  • The purple and gold combination is naturally luxurious — let the colors do the heavy lifting.
  • Gold metallic elements (foil balloons, gold streamers, gold ribbon) add warmth and richness to the purple.
  • LSU has one of the most passionate fanbases in college football — lean into the "Geaux Tigers" energy with bold, enthusiastic decorations.
  • Film a "setting up my LSU bed party" TikTok — these videos get enormous engagement from the LSU community.
  • Use #GeauxTigers #LSU2029 on your celebration posts.

LSU College Commitment Gifts

An LSU bed party gift kit is a perfect college acceptance gift for any Tigers fan. The purple and gold color scheme makes for an inherently royal and memorable gift presentation. Pack a LSU hoodie, blanket, purple and gold balloon letters, and streamers into a gift box. Add Mike the Tiger plush for the ultimate LSU gift. Everything is practical, school-spirited, and perfect for both the bed party photos and everyday dorm life.

Ready to Geaux? Shop our complete LSU Tigers bed party essentials — all available on Amazon with fast delivery so you can celebrate your Tigers commitment immediately.

title: The Ultimate Georgia Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Go Dawgs! Getting into the University of Georgia is a proud moment for any Bulldog fan — and a Georgia bed party is the perfect way to celebrate.
bodyHtml:
Go Dawgs! Getting into the University of Georgia is a proud moment for any Bulldog fan — and a Georgia bed party is the perfect way to celebrate. With UGA's striking red and black color scheme, Georgia bed parties are consistently some of the most dramatic and visually impactful on social media.

Red and black is a powerful, high-energy combination that photographs with incredible intensity. The deep red against the stark black creates bold contrast that immediately catches the eye. This guide has every Georgia bed party essential you need for a Go Dawgs celebration that will blow up on TikTok and Instagram.

Must-Have Georgia Bed Party Essentials

  • UGA Hoodie or Crewneck — A Georgia Bulldogs hoodie in red is the essential piece of your bed party outfit.
  • Georgia Blanket — A plush UGA fleece blanket in red and black is your bed's main layer.
  • UGA Pillows — Layer red and black Georgia Bulldogs throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • GO DAWGS Balloon Letters — Jumbo red or black letter balloons spelling "GO DAWGS" or "GEORGIA" are a UGA bed party classic.
  • Red & Black Streamers — Alternating red and black streamers create a dramatic, intense backdrop that photographs with incredible power.
  • Uga Bulldog Plush — The Uga Bulldog mascot plush belongs at the center of every Georgia bed party.
  • Georgia Flag or Banner — Hang a UGA Bulldogs flag behind your bed as a large-scale backdrop.
  • Red Balloons — Mix large red latex balloons with black foil balloons for a full Georgia balloon display.
  • UGA Hat — A red Georgia Bulldogs hat or cap adds the perfect athletic finishing touch.
  • Georgia Party Supplies — Red and black Georgia plates and cups are perfect for a full family celebration.

Georgia Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The Red & Black Wall

Georgia bed parties are known for going big on the backdrop. Cover the entire wall behind your bed with alternating red and black streamers from floor to ceiling. The intensity of red and black together is unlike any other school color combination — it's dramatic, bold, and completely unmistakable. This backdrop photographs beautifully and makes every photo look like a professional shoot.

The GO DAWGS Statement

Spell out "GO DAWGS" in jumbo red letter balloons and position them front and center against your streamer wall. This is the signature Georgia bed party moment that goes viral on TikTok every spring. Add a "G" balloon or an Uga plush on either side of the letter balloons for the complete Bulldogs look.

Georgia Bed Party Styling Tips

  • Red and black is inherently dramatic — go as big and bold as you can with the decorations.
  • The Uga Bulldog is one of the most beloved mascots in college football — feature him prominently.
  • A "National Champions" reference is always on-brand for Georgia fans.
  • Film your reaction when you got into Georgia as the intro to your TikTok bed party setup video.
  • Use #GoDawgs #UGA2029 on all your celebration posts.

Georgia College Commitment Gifts

A Georgia Bulldogs bed party kit is a perfect college acceptance gift for any UGA fan. Pack a red gift box with a Georgia hoodie, blanket, "GO DAWGS" balloon letters, and red and black streamers. Add Uga the bulldog plush for the perfect mascot moment. Every item doubles as practical dorm essentials that a Georgia student will use throughout their time in Athens.

Ready to Go Dawgs? Shop our complete Georgia Bulldogs bed party essentials — all available on Amazon with fast delivery so you can celebrate your UGA commitment right away.

title: The Ultimate Florida Gators Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Getting into the University of Florida is something to shout about — and a Florida Gators bed party is the loudest, most colorful way to do it.
bodyHtml:
It's Great to Be a Florida Gator! Getting into the University of Florida is something to shout about — and a Florida Gators bed party is the loudest, most colorful way to do it. UF's vibrant orange and blue color scheme creates some of the most energetic and eye-catching bed party setups on all of social media.

Orange and blue is a high-energy, high-contrast combination that absolutely pops on camera. The bright Florida orange is warm and exciting; the deep Gator blue grounds it. Together, they create a bed party setup that jumps off the screen. This guide covers every Florida Gators bed party essential you need for a celebration worthy of Gator Nation.

Must-Have Florida Gators Bed Party Essentials

  • Florida Gators Hoodie — An orange or blue UF hoodie is the anchor of your Gators bed party outfit.
  • Florida Gators Blanket — A plush UF blanket in orange and blue is the main layer of your bed setup.
  • Gators Pillows — Layer orange and blue Florida Gators throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • GATOR Balloon Letters — Jumbo orange or blue letter balloons spelling "GATOR" or "UF" are the most photographed Florida bed party element.
  • Orange & Blue Streamers — Alternating Florida orange and Gator blue streamers create a vibrant, energetic wall backdrop.
  • Albert the Gator Plush — Albert Gator, UF's beloved mascot, belongs front and center in every Florida bed party.
  • Florida Gators Flag — Hang a large UF Gators flag behind your bed as an iconic backdrop.
  • Gators Hat — An orange Florida Gators cap adds the athletic finishing touch to your layout.
  • Orange Foil Balloons — Large orange foil balloons add warmth and energy to the setup.
  • UF Party Supplies — Orange and blue plates and cups for hosting the full family Gator celebration.

Florida Gators Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The Orange & Blue Streamer Wall

Create a floor-to-ceiling Florida orange and Gator blue streamer backdrop behind your bed. The warm orange and cool blue create incredible contrast — one of the most visually dynamic color combinations in all of college sports. Position your "GATOR" balloon letters in front of this backdrop for the ultimate Florida bed party photo.

The Gator Chomp Setup

Place Albert the Gator plush prominently on your bed, mid-chomp pose if possible. Arrange orange and blue balloons in clusters on either side. Layer your UF blanket and Gators pillows on the bed. Wear your Florida hoodie and do the Gator Chomp for your hero photo — it's the most iconic Florida celebration pose.

Florida Gators Bed Party Styling Tips

  • Florida orange is one of the warmest and most vibrant school colors — lean into it with maximum orange elements.
  • The Gator Chomp is the ultimate Florida photo pose — make sure to do it in your main bed party photo.
  • Film a "setting up my Florida Gators bed party" TikTok — the Florida Gator community on TikTok is massive and engaged.
  • Mix orange foil balloons with blue latex balloons for a varied, textured balloon display.
  • Use #GatorNation #GoGators #UF2029 on your celebration posts.

Florida College Commitment Gifts

A Florida Gators bed party gift set is a perfect college acceptance gift for any UF fan. Pack an orange gift bag with a Gators hoodie, blanket, "GATOR" balloon letters, and orange and blue streamers. Add Albert the Gator plush for a fun mascot touch. These items all serve as real dorm essentials throughout their time at UF — making this one of the most useful and memorable college gifts possible.

Ready to chomp? Shop our complete Florida Gators bed party essentials — all available on Amazon so you can celebrate your UF commitment with everything delivered fast.

title: The Ultimate Ole Miss Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Hotty Toddy! Getting into the University of Mississippi is a moment to celebrate with maximum Rebel energy. An Ole Miss bed party is the perfect way to announce your commitment, show your Rebels pride, and create social media content that captures the spirit of Ole Miss.
bodyHtml:
Hotty Toddy! Getting into the University of Mississippi — one of the South's most beloved and spirited schools — is a moment to celebrate with maximum Rebel energy. An Ole Miss bed party is the perfect way to announce your commitment, show your Rebels pride, and create social media content that captures the spirit of Ole Miss.

Ole Miss's navy blue and red color scheme creates a rich, deep, Southern-styled bed party setup that looks timeless and classy. The dark navy combined with bold red and white accents has a distinctly Southern charm that makes Ole Miss bed parties feel more refined than your typical school spirit setup. This guide covers every Ole Miss bed party essential you need.

Must-Have Ole Miss Bed Party Essentials

  • Ole Miss Hoodie or Crewneck — A navy blue Ole Miss Rebels hoodie or crewneck anchors your bed party outfit.
  • Ole Miss Blanket — A plush Ole Miss blanket in navy and red is your bed's main centerpiece.
  • Rebels Pillows — Layer navy and red Ole Miss Rebels throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • HOTTY TODDY or OLE MISS Balloon Letters — Jumbo red or navy letter balloons are the most iconic Ole Miss bed party element.
  • Navy & Red Streamers — Alternating navy blue and red streamers create a rich, Southern-styled backdrop.
  • Colonel Reb or Landshark Merch — Ole Miss mascot items add authentic Rebels spirit to your setup.
  • Ole Miss Flag or Banner — Hang an Ole Miss Rebels flag behind your bed as a large-scale backdrop.
  • Red Foil Balloons — Large red foil balloons add warmth and energy against the navy blue.
  • Ole Miss Hat — A navy blue Rebels cap adds the finishing athletic touch.
  • "Hotty Toddy" Sign — A personalized "Hotty Toddy!" sign is the most on-brand Ole Miss bed party accessory.

Ole Miss Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The Southern Charm Backdrop

Create a navy and red streamer backdrop with an Ole Miss flag centered behind your bed. The dark navy base with red accents gives Ole Miss bed parties a more sophisticated, Southern aesthetic compared to schools with lighter color palettes. Add a "HOTTY TODDY" balloon letter display in front of the backdrop for the main focal point.

The Grove-Inspired Setup

Ole Miss has a legendary tailgating culture centered around The Grove — and you can channel that same energy in your bed party. Think rich navy, deep red, and white accents. A "Walk of Champions" spirit or a handmade "Hotty Toddy, Gosh Almighty" sign adds a uniquely Ole Miss touch.

Ole Miss College Commitment Gifts

An Ole Miss bed party gift kit is a perfect college acceptance gift for any Rebels fan. Pack a navy gift box with an Ole Miss hoodie, blanket, "HOTTY TODDY" balloon letters, and navy and red streamers. These items will be used throughout their time in Oxford — from game day tailgates to everyday dorm life.

Ready to say Hotty Toddy? Shop our complete Ole Miss Rebels bed party essentials — all available on Amazon with fast delivery so you can celebrate your commitment right away.

title: The Ultimate Tulane Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Getting into Tulane University is a big deal — and it deserves a celebration as vibrant and unique as the city of New Orleans itself.
bodyHtml:
Getting into Tulane University is a big deal — and it deserves a celebration as vibrant and unique as the city of New Orleans itself. A Tulane Green Wave bed party lets you show off your commitment to one of the South's most distinctive and exciting universities with a setup that's as lively and spirited as a second-line parade.

Tulane's kelly green and sky blue color scheme is fresh, vibrant, and photographs with a bright, energetic quality. The combination of deep green and clear blue is distinctive — Tulane bed parties stand out from the crowd precisely because their color palette is less common in college sports. This guide has every Tulane bed party essential you need.

Must-Have Tulane Bed Party Essentials

  • Tulane Hoodie or Crewneck — A kelly green Tulane Green Wave hoodie is the anchor of your bed party outfit.
  • Tulane Blanket — A Tulane-branded blanket in green and blue is your bed's main layer.
  • Green Wave Pillows — Layer green and white Tulane throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • TULANE Balloon Letters — Jumbo green letter balloons spelling "TULANE" or "GREEN WAVE" create a striking focal point.
  • Green Streamers — Kelly green and sky blue streamers create a bright, distinctive Tulane backdrop.
  • Riptide the Pelican Plush — Tulane's pelican mascot adds an authentic New Orleans touch to your setup.
  • Tulane Flag or Banner — Hang a Tulane Green Wave flag behind your bed as a backdrop.
  • Green Foil Balloons — Large green foil and latex balloons fill out the Tulane color palette.
  • Tulane Hat — A green Tulane cap adds the athletic finishing touch.
  • "Geaux Wave!" Sign — A hand-lettered "Geaux Wave!" sign is the most uniquely Tulane bed party accessory.

Tulane Bed Party Decoration Ideas

The key to a great Tulane bed party is leaning into the vibrant kelly green. Hang floor-to-ceiling green and blue streamers as your backdrop. Center a Tulane flag or a "Green Wave" banner in the middle. Your "TULANE" letter balloons positioned in front create the main focal point. Add Riptide the pelican on your bed for an authentic Tulane touch.

Tulane is in New Orleans, which means your bed party can incorporate NOLA energy — jazz-inspired decor elements, green and gold accents reminiscent of Mardi Gras, and an overall festive energy that celebrates not just the university but the incredible city it's in.

Tulane College Commitment Gifts

A Tulane bed party gift set is a perfect and unique college acceptance gift for any Green Wave fan. Pack a green gift bag with a Tulane hoodie, blanket, green balloon letters, and green streamers. Add Riptide the pelican for an authentic Tulane mascot moment. These items are perfect for both the celebration photos and everyday use in the dorms.

Ready to Geaux Wave? Shop our complete Tulane Green Wave bed party essentials — all available on Amazon with fast delivery so you can celebrate your commitment right away.

title: The Ultimate Indiana Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Getting into Indiana University Bloomington is a milestone worth celebrating in full Hoosiers style with crimson and cream decorations.
bodyHtml:
IU all the way! Getting into Indiana University Bloomington — one of the Big Ten's most vibrant and spirited campuses — is a milestone worth celebrating in full Hoosiers style. An Indiana bed party lets you announce your commitment with the warm, rich crimson and cream color scheme that makes IU setups feel both energetic and distinctly Midwestern.

Indiana's crimson red and cream color combination is warm, inviting, and photographs beautifully. The deep crimson against the warm cream creates a richer, more nuanced look than a simple red-and-white palette. This guide has every Indiana Hoosiers bed party essential you need for the perfect IU celebration.

Must-Have Indiana Bed Party Essentials

  • IU Hoodie or Crewneck — A crimson Indiana Hoosiers hoodie is the essential anchor of your bed party outfit.
  • Indiana Blanket — A plush IU blanket in crimson and cream is the main centerpiece of your bed.
  • Hoosiers Pillows — Layer crimson and cream Indiana throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • INDIANA Balloon Letters — Jumbo crimson letter balloons spelling "INDIANA" or "IU" create the main focal point of your bed party.
  • Crimson & Cream Streamers — Alternating crimson and cream (or white) streamers create a warm, rich backdrop.
  • Hoosier the Mascot Items — IU Hoosiers spirit items with the iconic "IU" block logo add authentic school spirit.
  • Indiana Flag or Banner — Hang an IU Hoosiers flag behind your bed as a large-scale backdrop.
  • Crimson Foil Balloons — Large crimson foil and latex balloons fill out the Hoosiers color palette.
  • IU Hat — A crimson Indiana Hoosiers snapback adds the finishing athletic touch.
  • Indiana Party Supplies — Crimson and cream plates and cups for hosting a full family IU celebration.

Indiana Bed Party Decoration Ideas

Create a warm, inviting Indiana backdrop by hanging alternating crimson and cream streamers behind your bed. The warm tone of this color combination feels cozy and Midwestern — perfect for an Indiana celebration. Center an IU flag or "Hoosiers" banner in the middle. Position your "INDIANA" or "IU" letter balloons in front.

Indiana bed parties have a distinctly warm, welcoming energy. Layer your IU blanket generously across the bed, pile on the crimson and cream pillows, and don't forget to wear your IU hoodie for the main photo. The Bloomington campus is beautiful — if possible, incorporate some of that cozy college town energy into your setup.

Indiana College Commitment Gifts

An Indiana Hoosiers bed party kit makes a perfect college acceptance gift for any IU fan. Pack a crimson gift box with an Indiana hoodie, blanket, "IU" balloon letters, and crimson and cream streamers. Everything in the set is practical and will be used throughout their Big Ten experience in Bloomington.

title: The Ultimate Tennessee Bed Party Guide
excerpt: Go Big Orange! Getting into the University of Tennessee is worth celebrating with a Tennessee Volunteers bed party that combines school pride and social media moments.
bodyHtml:
Go Big Orange! Getting into the University of Tennessee — home of the most iconic color in college football — is worth celebrating in the loudest, brightest way possible. A Tennessee Volunteers bed party is the perfect combination of school pride and social media moment, with UT's unmistakable Tennessee orange creating setups that are impossible to scroll past.

Tennessee orange is one of the most recognizable and energetic colors in all of college sports. There's nothing subtle about it — and that's the point. A Tennessee bed party should be bold, bright, and unmistakably Vol Nation. This guide covers every UT Vols bed party essential you need for a Go Big Orange celebration that will dominate your social media.

What Is a Tennessee Bed Party?

A Tennessee bed party is a college acceptance celebration where you surround yourself in Tennessee orange merchandise, decorations, and Vol Nation spirit to announce your commitment to UT. The trend has exploded on TikTok among college-bound seniors, and Tennessee bed parties are particularly viral because Tennessee orange is so visually striking — one look at a Vol bed party and you know exactly which school that student is going to.

Must-Have Tennessee Bed Party Essentials

  • Tennessee Hoodie or Crewneck — A Tennessee orange Volunteers hoodie is the essential, unmistakable centerpiece of your bed party outfit. Nothing says Vol Nation like a Tennessee orange hoodie.
  • Tennessee Blanket — A plush UT Vols blanket in Tennessee orange and white is the main layer of your bed setup.
  • Vols Pillows — Layer orange and white Tennessee Volunteers throw pillows at the head of your bed.
  • TENNESSEE Balloon Letters — Jumbo orange letter balloons spelling "TENNESSEE," "VOLS," or "UT" create the most vibrant, eye-catching bed party focal point.
  • Orange & White Streamers — Alternating Tennessee orange and white streamers create a high-energy, instantly recognizable Vol Nation backdrop.
  • Smokey the Dog Plush — Smokey, Tennessee's beloved Blue Tick Coonhound mascot, belongs front and center in every UT bed party.
  • Tennessee Flag or Banner — Hang a large UT Vols flag behind your bed as a dramatic backdrop.
  • Orange Foil Balloons — Large orange foil star and round balloons amplify the Tennessee orange energy.
  • Vols Hat — An orange Tennessee Volunteers cap adds the finishing athletic touch to your bed party layout.
  • Tennessee Party Supplies — Orange and white plates, cups, and napkins for hosting the full Vol Nation celebration with family.

Tennessee Bed Party Decoration Ideas

Go Full Big Orange

Tennessee bed parties have one rule: go as orange as humanly possible. Cover the wall behind your bed with floor-to-ceiling Tennessee orange and white streamers. Fill every corner with orange balloons. Layer orange upon orange upon white. The intensity of Tennessee orange is what makes Vol bed parties stop the scroll — don't hold back.

The Vol Nation Statement Wall

Hang alternating Tennessee orange and white streamers as your main backdrop. Center a "TENNESSEE" balloon letter display and a UT Vols flag in the middle. Add large orange foil balloon clusters on either side. Place Smokey on your bed and wear your Tennessee orange hoodie for the hero shot — this is the Vol Nation photo formula that goes viral every single time.

The Bed Setup

Start with your Tennessee blanket as the foundation. Layer orange and white pillows at the head. Place Smokey prominently. Arrange your Vol Nation hat, water bottle, and any other UT merchandise around the edges. The more Tennessee orange in the frame, the better.

Tennessee Bed Party Styling Tips

  • Tennessee orange is THE color — use it everywhere, in every layer, in every corner.
  • White accents make the orange even brighter — use white streamers, white balloons, and white pillows to maximize the orange impact.
  • Smokey is one of college football's most beloved mascots — feature him prominently in every photo.
  • Film a "Go Big Orange reveal" TikTok where you open your Tennessee acceptance letter and then cut to your fully decorated bed party.
  • Use #GoVols #VolNation #Tennessee2029 on all your celebration posts for maximum reach in the Vol Nation community.

Tennessee College Commitment Gifts

A Tennessee Volunteers bed party kit is one of the most exciting and unique college acceptance gifts you can give a Vol Nation fan. Pack an orange gift box with a Tennessee hoodie, blanket, orange balloon letters, and orange and white streamers. Add Smokey the dog plush for the ultimate Vol Nation gift. Every item is practical, school-spirited, and will be used throughout their Tennessee experience — from game days in Neyland Stadium to everyday dorm life in Knoxville.

Ready to Go Big Orange? Shop our complete Tennessee Volunteers bed party essentials — all available on Amazon with fast delivery so you can celebrate your UT commitment the moment the acceptance arrives.
